name: tencent-ssl
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud SSL Certificate query APIs.

Tencent_SSL.Tencent_SSL/ListCertificates.name: list-certificates
Tencent_SSL.Tencent_SSL/ListCertificates.description: List all SSL certificates in the account.

Tencent_SSL.Tencent_SSL/GetCertificate.name: get-certificate
Tencent_SSL.Tencent_SSL/GetCertificate.description: Get detailed info for a specific certificate.
